はぁ……最近、修行はちゃんとしているはずなのに<br>剣の腕前が伸び悩んでいる気:
*sigh*... Even though I've been training properly lately, I feel like my
sword skill has hit a plateau.
訓練所で毎日頑張っていても、<br>達人と呼ばれる域の方々とはやはり実力の差を感:
Even though I work hard at the training grounds every day, I still feel
the gap in ability between myself and those who are called masters...
フレイヤも剣の腕は確かだと思うがな。<br>何事もある程度まで急成長すると、そこ:
I think you have solid sword skills, Freya. It's common for growth to
plateau after a period of rapid improvement.
そうなんですよね……。そこで、わたしとその方との差は一体何なのかと思い、<br>:
That's right... So I wondered what the difference was between me and
those masters, and I followed them to investigate.
うーむ、あまり感心できることではないが……<br>この際、そこは目をつむろう。で:
Hmm, I can't say I approve... but I'll overlook it this time. So, did you
find anything?
わたしは見てしまったのです！<br>達人の方々が、ショーカンと呼ばれる怪しいお店:
I saw it! I saw the masters going into a suspicious shop called the
Brothel!
目撃したのは１人ではありません！ きっとあのお店の中で<br>特別な訓練をおこな:
It wasn't just one person! I'm sure they're doing some special training
inside that shop!
なのに、“ショーカン”でどんな修行をしているのか尋ねても<br>皆さんにはぐらか:
But when I ask what kind of training they do at the Brothel, everyone
just avoids the question and keeps it a secret...
でも、フレイヤみたいな箱入り娘のお嬢さんが行くような店じゃないぞ、<br>あそこ: But that place isn't for a sheltered young lady like you, Freya.
あーっ！ しれいかんまで秘密にするんですね！ ひどいです！: Ahh! Even you're keeping it a secret, Commander! That's mean!
このままではわたしの気がおさまりません！<br>わたしは決めました！ “ショーカ: I can't let this rest! I've decided! Please let me go to the Brothel!
フレイヤはえらい剣幕で迫って来る。: Freya pressed forward with fierce determination.
（やれやれ、こうなると引かないからなフレイヤは、<br>ちょっと脅して諦めさせる:
(Oh dear, once Freya gets like this she won't back down. Maybe I
should scare her off...)
娼館に入るには、俺との試練をクリアしないとダメな決まりになっている。<br>それ:
There's a rule that you have to pass a trial with me to enter the
Brothel. Can you handle that?
もちろんですよ！ どんなきつい試練だって耐えてみせます！: Of course! I'll endure any trial, no matter how tough!
フレイヤの表情は真剣だ。だが、彼女を娼館で働かせるのは気が進まない。<br>娼館:
Freya was serious. I'm reluctant to have her work at the Brothel. I
decided to make her see its reality so she'd give up on her own, but...
